advanced.hint: Raw YAML editor and backups. The controls above are shortcuts that write into it.

presets.title: Config presets
presets.subtitle: Apply a delivery/quality profile in one click: it backs up config.yaml, writes it and hot-reloads. It never overwrites S3 credentials or secrets.
presets.confirm: Apply the "{{title}}" preset to {{app}}? The current config.yaml is backed up first and the app is hot-reloaded. Continue?

result.noChange: The config already matched the preset — nothing changed.

transcoding.title: Transcoding configuration
transcoding.subtitle: Adaptive delivery (simulcast) and the rendition ladder.
transcoding.shortcutNote: These controls are shortcuts: saving writes them into the app's config.yaml. The raw YAML editor under "Advanced" is the source of truth — both edit the same file.
transcoding.saveTooltip: Writes these transcoding settings into the app's config.yaml (does not touch the raw editor's unsaved text).
transcoding.saveHint: Saves the transcoding settings above to config.yaml.
transcoding.adaptiveHint: Enables multiple quality layers for the WebRTC player.
transcoding.rtmpTranscodeHint: Converts the RTMP ingress into a multi-layer ladder.
transcoding.gpuSubtitle: Encoder that FFmpeg uses to transcode.
transcoding.hwaccelHintAvailable: Auto picks GPU when it makes sense; GPU forces hardware; CPU forces software.
transcoding.hwaccelHintUnavailable: No GPU on this server: GPU and Auto automatically fall back to CPU (software).
transcoding.noLayers: No layers defined. The server will use its default ladder.

raw.title: config.yaml (raw)
raw.subtitle: Edit this app's full YAML. On save it is validated (parse + shape) and hot-reloaded in memory without restarting the process or cutting other streams.
raw.sourceOfTruthNote: This raw YAML is the source of truth. The structured controls above are shortcuts that read from and write to this same file.
raw.reloadTooltip: Manual hot-reload of this app (does not restart the process)
raw.restartTooltip: Restarts the streamhub-core process (affects all apps)
raw.restartServerHint: Restarts the whole streamhub-core process. Cuts the live streams of every app.
raw.restartSuccess: Restart requested. The server may take a few seconds to come back.
raw.dryRunTooltip: Validates the YAML and shows the diff vs the live config, without writing anything
raw.saveTooltip: Writes this YAML to config.yaml and hot-reloads it (this app only, no process restart).

dryRun.validWithDiff: Valid YAML. Review the diff before saving — nothing has been written yet.
dryRun.validNoDiff: Valid YAML. No changes compared to the live config.
dryRun.invalid: Invalid YAML. Fix the errors before saving.

restartDialog.title: Restart the whole server?
restartDialog.body: This restarts the streamhub-core process (systemd). It is not the same as "Restart app" — it does not just reload this app.
restartDialog.warning: The live streams and connections of EVERY app on this server are cut for a few seconds. Only do this if you know why.
restartDialog.ack: I understand this interrupts the live streams of every app on the server.

backups.confirmRestore: Revert the config.yaml of "{{app}}" to backup {{ts}}. A backup of the current state is taken before overwriting, and it is hot-reloaded. Continue?
backups.title: config.yaml backups
backups.subtitle: Every save leaves a timestamped backup. Review it and revert if something went wrong.
backups.empty: No backups yet (they are created when you save the config).
